politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: # Discord Privacy Policy

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Discord Netherlands BV is the “data controller” of your personal information collected through the services

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can contact Discord Netherlands BV’s Data Protection Officer at dpo@discord.com.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Account information**. When you create a Discord account, you can come up with a username and password, and provide a way of contacting you (such as an email address and/or phone number). You’ll also need to provide your birthday.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Under certain data protection laws like GDPR, companies must have a “legal basis”—a valid reason—to process personal information. Discord relies on different legal bases to process your information for the purposes described in this Privacy Policy.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We require the information that enables us to create your account, provide and maintain our services, meet our commitments to our users, and satisfy our legal requirements. The rest is optional.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We retain personal information until we determine it is no longer needed for the processing purposes for which we collected or retain it or for legal compliance.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may provide information to vendors we hire to carry out specific work for us. This includes payment processors like Stripe and PayPal that process transactions on our behalf and cloud providers like Google that host our data and our services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This processing can include use of automated technologies such as machine learning systems that help us power and improve our services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We take a number of steps to help protect your information. All information sent within our services is encrypted both in transit and at rest.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may receive information about you from other sources, including from other users and third parties, and combine that information with the other information we have about you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may receive information about you from advertisers and third-party data providers, such as demographic information and how you engage with other products and services outside of Discord.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If you have any questions about these rights or wish to exercise control over your information, please reach out to privacy@discord.com.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Right to rectify your personal data if it is incorrect

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Right of access to your personal data

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Right to erase your personal data

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Right to limit the processing of your personal data

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Right to the portability of your personal data

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Right to object to the processing of your personal data

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: #### Last Updated: August 29, 2025

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: You can find out more about Discord’s cookie usage and how you can manage your cookie permissions in our Cookie Policy.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Détail des types de cookies déposés

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: We are based in the United States, and we process and store information on servers located in the United States.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
transferts_hors_ue.quote: We may also store information on servers and equipment in other countries depending on a variety of factors, including the locations of our users and service providers.
